name: op-note-gen
description: Static operation note generator for common general surgical procedures.

scripts.check:js: node --check docs/theme.js && node --check docs/js/core.js && node --check docs/js/note-formatters.js && node --check docs/js/procedures.js && node --check docs/js/app.js && node --check tests/helpers/v1-browser-harness.js && node --check tests/fixtures/v1/fixture-inputs.js && node --check tests/procedure-smoke.test.js && node --check tests/v1-parity-fixtures.test.js
scripts.test:v1: npm run check:js && node tests/procedure-smoke.test.js && node tests/v1-parity-fixtures.test.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:dist && npm run test:v1
